start.title: Period Start
start.description: Start of the export period in ISO 8601 datetime format.

end.title: Period End
end.description: End of the export period in ISO 8601 datetime format.

first.title: First Event
first.description: First event record in the exported period.

last.title: Last Event
last.description: Last event record in the exported period.

discarded.title: Records Discarded
discarded.description: Whether any records were discarded ("S" or "N").

EventExport.description: EventExport contains summary data for an export of event records over a period.

type.title: Event Type
type.description: Event type code from L2E list.

EventRecord.description: EventRecord identifies a specific event in an export or summary.
